caption: 周五五点，又加了。
scene: Sage sitting at a desk facing two simple monitor rectangles, one showing a small to-do list with a fresh line added at the bottom, a floating speech bubble from off-frame with a tiny plus sign inside, Sage's face a perfectly flat neutral line, one tiny sweat drop on his temple, a small wall clock reading 5:00
bible_hook: §2 the PM adds scope on Friday at 5pm, Sage keeps a straight face
rationale: Recent posts leaned domestic/cozy and Andy-heavy on the work side; this anchors to Sage's specific big-org grind moment, a fresh motif (Friday scope-add) not touched in the last 30 days.
